---
title: "Priors"
pagetitle: "Priors — Josh Pearlson"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
css:
  - ../css/index.css
  - ../css/blog_homepage.css
include-after-body:
  - ../javaScript/articles-table.html
  - ../javaScript/category-active.html
  - ../javaScript/terminal.html
---

```{=html}
<div class="jcp-terminal" id="jcp-terminal">
  <div class="t-tabs">
    <a href="/" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>home</a>
    <a href="/aboutPage/about.html" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>about</a>
    <a href="/articles/blog.html" class="t-tab t-tab-active"><span class="t-tab-indicator">▸</span>articles</a>
    <a href="/projects/projects.html" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>projects</a>
    <a href="/contact/contact.html" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>contact</a>
    <div class="t-tabs-spacer"></div>
    <div class="t-title" id="t-title">jcp@joshpearlson: ~/articles</div>
  </div>
  <div class="t-body" id="t-body" data-page="other">

    <div class="jcp-art-h2"># priors — updating beliefs on markets and machines</div>

    <div class="jcp-subscribe">
      <span class="jcp-sub-label">$ subscribe</span>
      <form action="https://buttondown.com/api/emails/embed-subscribe/jcp"
            method="post"
            class="jcp-sub-form"
            target="_blank">
        <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="you@domain.com" required class="jcp-sub-input" />
        <button type="submit" class="jcp-sub-btn" aria-label="subscribe">→</button>
      </form>
      <span class="jcp-sub-hint">one email per post · no spam</span>
    </div>

    <div id="jcp-articles-mount"></div>

  </div>
  <div class="t-status">
    <span><span class="t-status-dot">●</span> online</span>
    <span id="t-status-count">— articles · — projects</span>
    <span class="t-status-weather" id="t-status-weather">
      <span class="t-weather-glyph">·</span> NYC --°F <span class="t-sep">·</span> 40.7128° N, 74.0060° W
    </span>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// GoatCounter event for newsletter signup on blog listing
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var form = document.querySelector('.jcp-sub-form');
  if (form) {
    form.addEventListener('submit', function() {
      if (window.goatcounter && window.goatcounter.count) {
        window.goatcounter.count({
          path: 'subscribe-blog',
          title: 'Newsletter Signup - Blog',
          event: true
        });
      }
    });
  }
});
</script>
```
